runtime_contract.diagnostic_note: This validates risk gates across all clean config-rule signals. It is useful breadth context, but only selected prior-only replay can promote execution behavior.

interpretation: All-clean config risk-gate validation has 5 prior-only breadth fold(s). The selected shadow gate earned 7.0% planned ROI versus 9.6% with no gate, a -2.6% lift. The best fixed diagnostic gate was exclude_high_risk at 11.8%, 2.2% versus no gate. Status remains diagnostic_only_breadth_validation because non-selected clean rows are breadth diagnostics, not promotion evidence.
